title: elaeocarpus orohensis
intro: Elaeocarpus orohensis, also known as the mountain blue fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. Native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and fruits of Elaeocarpus orohensis possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine and home remedies.
